location: Dropped by the boss Demi-Human Queen Margot at the end of Volcano Cave, a small cave dungeon in the cliffs north of Mt. Gelmir.
tactics: From Ninth Mt. Gelmir Campsite grace, cross the nearby bridge and follow the cliff path north past soldiers and demi-humans to the cave mouth
Clear demi-human groups inside, then push through to the fog gate
Margot's staff-based ranged phase is heavily telegraphed — keep distance and punish openings between casts
She eventually drops the staff for melee swipes/slams — stay mobile in the roomy cavern and watch for a punishing grab attack
lore: An experimental, explosive-powered jar-cannon that ended up at the Volcano Manor assault — its unwieldy, slow-reload design suggests nobody on hand really knew how to operate it properly.

builds.name: Any build (utility)
builds.why: Zero stat scaling — a heavy single-shot guard-breaker or burst option that just needs the STR/DEX requirement met, not stat investment
